a.xlink:title: Number of ranks. This includes ranks from both participants, e.g. minimal size is 2...

True if this process is running the master.
True if this process is running a slave.
Unconditionally initializes the MPI environment.

returns the commstate representing comm

Returns size of comm.

returns a commstate containing MPI_COMM_WORLD

Returns true, if a connection to a remote participant has been established.
Stops an event and commit it. If it's already stopped it has no effect.
Adds named integer data, associated to an event.
